title: oldenlandia crouchiana
intro: Oldenlandia crouchiana, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Oldenlandia crouchiana include its potential to treat fever, headache, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
